---
title: "Event Plot Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `EventPlotWidget`, which displays neuroscience-style raster plots showing events across multiple channels or trials.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/EventPlotWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `EventPlotWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
